allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/api/extract-file -H 'Content-Type: application/octet-stream' -H 'X-Filename: test.txt' --data 'Das ist ein Test.')
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('ffmpeg-static'\); console.log\('path:', p\); const fs = require\('fs'\); console.log\('exists:', fs.existsSync\(p\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const r = require\('@remotion/renderer'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(r\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('back'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('transp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('frame'\)\)\)")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); uv --version; ffmpeg -version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1; ffprobe -version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1)
